reviewsSample.text: Very competitave and collectable
Samsung TV deals

I don't recommend buying from this appliance store... because they cheated me more than once. They sold me an LG double-door refrigerator and freezer, claiming it was the best model. When I installed it at home, every time the power went out and came back on, the refrigerator would make a horn-like noise until someone turned it off. When I contacted them, they told me to call LG customer service. I did, and they were very respectful and attentive. When they came and inspected the refrigerator and freezer, they said this feature is part of the manufacturing process to warn the user... but in Iraq, it's not good because the power goes out so often. One of the supervisors said the store owner sold it to me because he knew this was the reason and sold it for less than the older model, and he was right. The problem was another time when I bought a white LG 16kg washer and dryer from them. They said delivery wasn't their responsibility, so I told them to find someone to deliver them to my house. It took a while for us to install the washer and dryer because... I was traveling and the guy who was installing it called me. He said, "Hey, this dryer and washer have some damage on the side, just minor damage." I told him, "How come? I bought them brand new!" He said, "Then he sold you stock he had in his warehouse..." When I contacted the showroom, they denied it and said, "It might have happened during transport..." After a while, I went to a showroom owner in Iraq and told him what happened. He said, "Be careful of them. They're scammers. They call themselves LG agents, but they're just swindlers. Since he sold them to you and told you he had a special offer, it means he either had stock in his warehouse or it was damaged, which is why he sold it to you at a lower price..." That's why I don't advise anyone to buy from him. (This is from Al-Raya Al-Mudhi'a Company in Karrada outside...) May God punish those who scam and exploit people unjustly. May God suffice me against them.

I hope this message finds you well.

Faris Ghanim
